title: PwD - View Product Card (Preview Summary) - Functional Test Plan (34 Test Cases)
overview: Functional testing of SCRUM-77: PwD - View Product Card (Preview Summary). Validates that a PwD user can quickly understand what each product offers from its card on the catalog landing page — including thumbnail image, product name, tags, rating, short description, key features, availability badge, hover/focus highlight, View Details navigation, and sign-in/create-account flow for unauthenticated users.

testCases.title: Product Card Includes Thumbnail Image
steps: Verify an image (CSS background-image) is present.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog page.
expectedResults: Product card contains a visible image (CSS background-image).

testCases.title: Product Card Includes Product Name as Heading
steps: Verify an h3 heading with the product name is present.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog page.
expectedResults: Product card contains an h3 heading with the product name.

testCases.title: Product Card Includes Tags (Disability Type / Category)
steps: Verify at least one tag/badge is displayed.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog page.
expectedResults: At least one tag/badge is displayed on the product card.

testCases.title: Product Card Includes Star Rating Element
steps: Verify a star rating element is present.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog page.
expectedResults: A star rating element is present on the product card.

testCases.title: Product Card Includes Review Count
steps: Verify a review count in parentheses is displayed.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog page.
expectedResults: A review count in parentheses is displayed.

testCases.title: Product Card Includes Short Description
steps: Verify a short description text is present beyond the heading.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog page.
expectedResults: A short description text is present beyond the heading.

testCases.title: Product Card Includes Key Features Section
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog page.
expectedResults: 'Key Features' text is present on the product card.

testCases.title: Product Card Includes Availability Badge
steps: Verify an availability badge is present.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog page.
expectedResults: An availability badge (e.g., 'In Stock') is visible.

testCases.title: Product Card Includes Price
steps: Verify a price in ₹ format is displayed.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog page.
expectedResults: A price in ₹ format is displayed on the product card.

testCases.title: Product Card 'View Details' Link is Present
steps: Verify a 'View Details' link is visible.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog page.
expectedResults: 'View Details' link is visible.
Link href contains '/product/'.

testCases.title: All Product Cards on Page Have Required Elements
steps: For each product card on the page, verify: heading, price, View Details link.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog page.
expectedResults: Every product card has a heading, price, and View Details link.

testCases.title: View Details Opens Sign-In Modal for Unauthenticated User
steps: Navigate to the catalog page (not logged in).
Click 'View Details' on the first product card.
testCases.preconditions: User is not logged in and on the catalog page.
expectedResults: Clicking 'View Details' opens a sign-in modal or dialog.

testCases.title: Sign-In Modal Contains Sign In Button
steps: Click 'View Details' to trigger sign-in modal.
Verify a 'Sign In' button is present.
testCases.preconditions: Sign-in modal is open.
expectedResults: A 'Sign In' button is present in the modal.

testCases.title: Sign-In Modal Contains Create Account Option
steps: Click 'View Details' to trigger sign-in modal.
Verify a 'Create Account' or 'Register' option is present.
testCases.preconditions: Sign-in modal is open.
expectedResults: A 'Create Account' or 'Register' option is present.

testCases.title: Sign-In Modal is Dismissible
steps: Click 'View Details' to trigger sign-in modal.
Close the modal via close button or Escape key.
Verify the catalog page is still visible.
testCases.preconditions: Sign-in modal is open.
expectedResults: Modal closes via close button or Escape key.
Catalog page is still visible.

testCases.title: Create Account Link Points to QA Environment Not Production
steps: Navigate to the catalog page (not logged in).
Click 'View Details' on the first product card.
testCases.preconditions: User is not logged in and on the catalog page.
expectedResults: Create Account link does NOT contain 'portal.swarajability.org'.
Link contains 'ui-qa.swarajability.org'.

testCases.title: Multiple View Details Clicks Show Consistent Modal
steps: Click 'View Details' on the first card — observe modal.
Click 'View Details' on the second card — observe modal.
testCases.preconditions: User is not logged in and on the catalog page.
expectedResults: Sign-in modal appears consistently for multiple View Details clicks.

testCases.title: Product Cards Display in Grid Layout (2 Columns on Desktop)
steps: Navigate to the catalog page at desktop viewport.
Verify first two cards are side by side.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog page at desktop viewport (1280x720).
expectedResults: First two cards are side by side in a 2-column grid.

testCases.title: Product Cards Stack in Single Column on Mobile
testCases.preconditions: Browser viewport set to mobile (375x667).
expectedResults: Product cards stack vertically in a single column.

testCases.title: Product Cards Have Consistent Height in Same Row
steps: Compare bounding box heights of first two cards.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog page.
expectedResults: First two cards have similar height (within 20px).

testCases.title: Correct Number of Cards Per Page
steps: Count the product cards on the page.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog page.
expectedResults: Number of product cards on the page matches expected per-page limit.

testCases.title: Card Hover Changes Visual State
steps: Hover over the first product card.
Check for visual change (box-shadow, transform, or background change).
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog page.
expectedResults: Hovering changes visual state (box-shadow, transform, or background).

testCases.title: Hover Does Not Trigger Unexpected Navigation
steps: Hover over the first product card.
Verify the URL does not change.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog page.
expectedResults: URL does not change on hover.

testCases.title: View Details Link href Points to Product Detail Page
steps: Inspect the href of the first 'View Details' link.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog page.
expectedResults: View Details link href contains '/product/'.

testCases.title: Product Cards Render After Sort Change
steps: Change sort to 'Name: A to Z'.
Verify card count remains the same.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog page.
expectedResults: Card count remains the same after sort change.

testCases.title: Product Cards Render After Filter Change
steps: Verify product cards are still visible.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog page.
expectedResults: Product cards are still visible after applying a filter.

testCases.title: Product Cards Visible on Page 2 via Pagination
steps: Verify product cards are visible on page 2.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog page with pagination.
expectedResults: Product cards are visible on page 2.

testCases.title: No Horizontal Overflow on Mobile with Product Cards
testCases.preconditions: Browser viewport set to mobile (375x667).
expectedResults: Body scroll width does not exceed viewport width.

testCases.title: Product Card Content Does Not Overlap
steps: Verify the first card's bounding box does not overlap with the second card.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog page.
expectedResults: First card's bounding box does not overlap with the second card.

testCases.title: Product Card Image Area Has Non-Zero Dimensions
steps: Get the bounding box of the first product card.
Verify it has non-zero width and height.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog page.
expectedResults: Product card has non-zero width and height.

testCases.title: Product Cards Render on Tablet Viewport
testCases.preconditions: Browser viewport set to tablet (768x1024).
expectedResults: Product cards are visible on tablet viewport.

testCases.title: Rapid Scroll Through Product Cards Does Not Break Layout
steps: Rapidly scroll to the bottom and back to top.
Verify product cards are still visible.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog page.
expectedResults: Product cards are still visible after rapid scrolling.

testCases.title: Product Card Tags Are Not Empty Strings
steps: Extract text from the first product card.
Verify at least one known tag pattern is present with non-empty text.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog page.
expectedResults: At least one known tag pattern is present with non-empty text.

testCases.title: View Details Links Are Unique Per Product Card
steps: Extract href from the first two 'View Details' links.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the catalog page.
expectedResults: First two View Details links have different hrefs.
